description: Canonical visual DNA for the FrankX brand. All generated images, page designs, and visual assets must align with these specifications.

heroImages.backgroundRequirement: Must blend with #0a0a0b — no white/light backgrounds
heroImages.overlayCompatibility: Must survive gradient overlay (from-[#0a0a0b]/60) on bottom 40%
heroImages.contentDistribution: Visual interest distributed across frame, not concentrated in one corner

ogImages.requirements: Clear at thumbnail size, brand-identifiable, text must be readable at 300px wide

cardThumbnails.requirements: Must read clearly at 300px wide, single focal point

avatars.format: Use _thumb.jpeg variants for all avatar/small format usage

atmospheric.description: Moody, cinematic, depth-of-field. For homepage showcases and hero sections.

branded.description: Contains FrankX logo/branding, product-specific visual identity.

technical.description: Architecture diagrams, system visualizations, data flows. For documentation.

artistic.description: Generative art, nature-tech fusion, experimental. For Design Lab.

cinematic.description: Character-focused, epic scale, narrative. For Arcanea and storytelling.

generationDefaults.negativePrompt: text, watermark, logo, bright background, white background, cartoon, flat design

qualityCouncil.description: Three-perspective review for every visual decision

perspectives.question: Does this match FrankX visual DNA? Dark theme, accent harmony, premium feel?
perspectives.rejectIf: Light backgrounds, clashing colors, cheap/generic stock feel, spiritual imagery

perspectives.question: Does this image drive the user toward the section's goal? Is it mood-setting or distracting?
perspectives.rejectIf: Information-dense at showcase size, unreadable text, competing visual hierarchy

perspectives.question: Does this work for all users? Sufficient contrast, meaningful alt text, not seizure-inducing?
perspectives.rejectIf: Low contrast text over image, empty alt text, rapid animation, color-only information

backupStrategy.versionControl: Git LFS for originals, optimized copies in /public
backupStrategy.retentionPolicy: Never delete originals — archive unused images to /public/images/_archive/
